title: pyrethrum peucedanifolium
intro: Pyrethrum peucedanifolium, also known as the sea parsley or coastal carrot, is a flowering plant native to Australia, known for its distinctive carrot-like appearance. The medicinal properties of pyrethrum peucedanifolium include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which are derived from its essential oils. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Pyrethrum peucedanifolium can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
